decision.recommended_digest: compact origin/scenario/level digest from campaign pack + origin corpus + quality metrics; never raw 100k
decision.reason: 100k candidates passed contract and source/proof checks; raw promotion remains forbidden; compact digest should preserve ladder lessons, failure modes, proof surfaces and retention rules.

boundary: Quality gate only. No digest/absorption/memory mutation performed by this report.

schema_reclassification.reason: candidate_factory does not propagate origin_id/scenario_family/depth_level_band into generated candidates. Coverage must be measured from campaign pack/origin; novelty/contract from generated candidates and ready lane.
